Extract Edge Indicator Samples from bgms Objects

Source: R/extractor_functions.R
extract_indicators.bgms.Rd

Retrieves posterior samples of edge inclusion indicators from a model fitted with [bgm()] using edge selection.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'bgms'
extract_indicators(bgms_object)

Arguments

bgms_object

An object of class `bgms` returned by [bgm()].

Value

A matrix with one row per post-warmup iteration and one column per edge, containing binary (0/1) indicator samples.

See also

[bgm()], [summary.bgms()], [coef.bgms()]

Other extractors: extract_arguments.bgmCompare(), extract_arguments.bgms(), extract_category_thresholds.bgmCompare(), extract_category_thresholds.bgms(), extract_ess.bgmCompare(), extract_ess.bgms(), extract_group_params.bgmCompare(), extract_indicator_priors.bgmCompare(), extract_indicator_priors.bgms(), extract_indicators.bgmCompare(), extract_pairwise_interactions.bgmCompare(), extract_pairwise_interactions.bgms(), extract_posterior_inclusion_probabilities.bgmCompare(), extract_posterior_inclusion_probabilities.bgms(), extract_rhat.bgmCompare(), extract_rhat.bgms(), extract_sbm.bgms()
